title: Quiet Fishing
description:
Mute other fishing bobber sound.
(old name : Quite Fishing)
body:
# 🌟 Features

## 🎯 Focus On Your Own Bobber
Stop getting distracted by other players' noise! This mod mutes all fishing bobber sounds except for your own.

## 🔊 Always Hear Your Catch
No more worrying about missing a catch because you cast your line too far. Your own bobber's sound will always be heard at a consistent volume, regardless of distance.

## ⚙️ Easy Configuration (Config GUI, Powered by MidnightLib) 
For convenience, this mod provides a settings screen (e.g., via Mod Menu) where you can easily toggle the features on or off at any time.

## 📦 Cross-Loader Support
This mod supports multiple mod loaders (Fabric/NeoForge), allowing you to use it in your preferred environment.

[한국어 설명](https://github.com/junhuk1113/QuiteFishing/blob/1.20.6/README.ko.md)
